microsoft_ft: Owned **end-to-end execution** of Azure's recovery validation program, scaling from a 2-person operation into a platformized system sustaining 45+ annual resilience drills and driving **$14M+ impact** across strategic partners including Databricks, Walmart, SAP, and NetApp.

Led 0→1 development of an internal **Resilience Automation Platform**, defining self-service scheduling requirements that cut operational toil by 30% and enabled engineering teams to deploy and run drills without manual coordination overhead.

Pioneered Azure's first proactive resilience testing capability, delivering a **rack-level drill program** in 4 months with a 94% recovery rate — surfacing critical hardware defects and establishing a new continuous-validation model for enterprise customers.

Served as bridge lead on a sovereign-cloud **network isolation test** tied to a $1.5B+ contract, directing 14 cross-org recovery executions under executive visibility and translating complex technical constraints into clear partner-facing architectures.

Built an internal **AI agent** for drill planning and restructured automation workflows, cutting planning cycle time by 39% and expanding drill capacity by 21% — applying LLM-powered tooling to accelerate high-stakes operational execution.

Collaborated daily with engineers and executives across strategic partner orgs to align on integration requirements, surface API limitations, and co-design solutions — mirroring the customer-embedded, hands-on ownership model of forward-deployed engineering.
microsoft_2023: Drove **product adoption** of AI-driven code generation workflows by running hands-on demos and technical training sessions with 14 Azure service teams, saving 37 engineering hours monthly and accelerating team-level integration of LLM-powered tooling.

Shaped the product roadmap toward **intent-based YAML generation** by conducting 11+ structured user interviews with Azure engineers to surface critical API integration gaps — translating field feedback directly into prioritized feature requirements.

Improved **semantic search** fidelity and cut documentation lookup time by 83% by implementing rigorous metadata standards and migrating content to an AI-powered retrieval system, enabling faster and more accurate access to technical resources across teams.
microsoft_2022: Generated **$3M in accelerated revenue** and launched Azure regions 28% faster by securing cross-functional alignment on a unified automation prioritization framework spanning 140+ engineering and operations teams.

Conducted discovery interviews with 20+ service teams to surface 81 hours of manual effort per region launch, then built a **roadmap to automate critical paths** — directly informing the product strategy to eliminate high-toil deployment bottlenecks.

Engineered a **Power BI dashboard** to track operational toil across 140+ teams, giving leadership real-time visibility to target automation gaps, prioritize high-impact initiatives, and justify resourcing decisions with data-backed evidence.
amazon_robotics: Achieved **zero operational downtime** during a 2,000+ unit pilot transition by defining the legacy OS migration strategy, mapping software and hardware dependencies across 1,200+ stations, and coordinating deployment sequencing across IT and Engineering.

Facilitated Agile ceremonies — sprint planning, backlog grooming, and retrospectives — resolving **40+ high-priority tickets** and stabilizing the developer intake process to maintain velocity through a complex, multi-team system migration.

Drove alignment across IT, Operations, and Engineering to implement **automated CI/CD pipelines**, accelerating the software deployment cycle by 25% and reducing the manual coordination overhead required to push validated builds to production.
pro_painters: Increased job bookings by **26%** by redesigning the end-to-end scoping and invoicing lifecycle for 200+ monthly proposals, building a structured CRM process that gave the sales team consistent, repeatable workflows and faster customer response times.

Reduced **Customer Acquisition Cost by 13%** and lifted conversion rates by 2.7% by executing a digital-first go-to-market strategy — optimizing the company website and Google Business profile to improve discoverability and lead quality.

Improved leadership pricing decisions by conducting **financial profitability analysis** across 1,000+ project records, identifying and sealing margin leaks that had gone undetected and translating findings into a revised, data-backed pricing model.

'Customer-embedded' and 'hands-on' framing from JD's 'embedded with strategic customers' and 'working hands-on' reflected in microsoft_ft bullet#6, which explicitly names the forward-deployed model.

'API integration' and 'software architecture' from JD requirements surfaced in microsoft_ft bullet#4 ('API limitations,' 'co-design solutions') and microsoft_2023 bullet#2 ('API integration gaps') — matching JD's 'deep understanding of software development, software architecture, and APIs integration.'

'LLM-powered tooling' and 'AI agent' from ElevenLabs' AI-first culture woven into microsoft_ft bullet#5 and microsoft_2023 bullet#1 — signals direct alignment with ElevenLabs' product surface (ElevenAgents, ElevenAPI).
'Collaborate with engineers and executives' from JD bullet woven verbatim into microsoft_ft bullet#6 — recruiter reading the JD will see exact role expectation reflected back.
